verses.text: Bezaleel makes the ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold, with staves. The ark. The chest of the covenant is built.
Bezaleel makes the ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold, with staves. The ark. The chest of the covenant is built.

Bezaleel makes the ark of shittim wood overlaid with gold, with staves. The ark. The chest of the covenant is built.
The mercy seat with two cherubims overshadowing it. Mercy seat. The place of meeting is wrought.
The mercy seat with two cherubims overshadowing it. Mercy seat. The place of meeting is wrought.

The mercy seat with two cherubims overshadowing it. Mercy seat. The place of meeting is wrought.
The table of shittim wood overlaid with gold, with rings. The table. A place for the bread is made.
The table of shittim wood overlaid with gold, with rings. The table. A place for the bread is made.

Its dishes, spoons, and bowls of pure gold are made. The vessels. Tools for the holy bread.
Its dishes, spoons, and bowls of pure gold are made. The vessels. Tools for the holy bread.
Its dishes, spoons, and bowls of pure gold are made. The vessels. Tools for the holy bread.
The candlestick of pure beaten gold with its branches and bowls. The lampstand. Light is fashioned for God's house.
The candlestick of pure beaten gold with its branches and bowls. The lampstand. Light is fashioned for God's house.

Its knops, flowers, and snuffers of pure gold complete it. Finished. The lamp is wrought of a talent of gold.

The altar of incense overlaid with gold, with its staves. Incense altar. A place for fragrant prayer.
The altar of incense overlaid with gold, with its staves. Incense altar. A place for fragrant prayer.

The holy anointing oil and pure incense are made. The oil. Sacred things are prepared.
